mapper.insert: INSERT INTO swork (swid, twid, sid, scontent, spublish, correct, score, correction) VALUES (#{swid}, #{twid}, #{sid}, #{scontent}, #{spublish}, #{correct}, #{score}, #{correction})
mapper.update: UPDATE swork SET correction = #{correction}, correct = 1 WHERE swid = #{swid}
UPDATE swork SET score = #{score} WHERE swid = #{swid}
UPDATE swork SET scontent = #{scontent} WHERE swid = #{swid}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swork WHERE twid = #{twid} AND correct = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swork WHERE twid = #{twid} AND correct = 1

SELECT swid, twid, ssc.sid, snum, sname, scontent, spublish, correct, score, correction FROM ( SELECT student.sid, student.sname, student.snum FROM student, sc WHERE student.sid = sc.sid AND sc.cid = (SELECT cid FROM twork WHERE twid = #{twid}) ) AS ssc LEFT JOIN swork ON ssc.sid = swork.sid AND twid = #{twid} WHERE spublish IS NOT NULL

SELECT swid, twid, ssc.sid, snum, sname, scontent, spublish, correct, score, correction FROM ( SELECT student.sid, student.sname, student.snum FROM student, sc WHERE student.sid = sc.sid AND sc.cid = (SELECT cid FROM twork WHERE twid = #{twid}) ) AS ssc LEFT JOIN swork ON ssc.sid = swork.sid AND twid = #{twid} WHERE spublish IS NULL
